title: Pay up or not? Ransomware surge has victims facing tough choices
summary: Jim Walter, a senior threat researcher at SentinelOne, says that his cyber security group takes a hard line against responding to ransoms. “Paying extortive threat actors only strengthens the ecosystem and the entities that enable it,” he says, noting that threat actors…
